memory_entries.text: In the recurring SQLite product review datasets, table group mapping discovered: g1 = Office Products (taxn_g1 cat_lvl 0 Office Products), g2 = Electronics (taxn_g2 cat_lvl 0 Electronics), and g3 is Musical Instruments. Feedback/reviews tables are fdbk_g1/fdbk_g2/fdbk_g3 with ts as TEXT date; use substr(ts,1,7) to aggregate by year-month.
